testcase.name: test_get_cert_chain_success

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert '-----BEGIN C...FICATE-----\n' == '-----BEGIN C...FICATE-----\n'
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- + MIIDXzCCAuagAwIBAgIQNuBZ7YiN1Xrt1XC2cn+b2jAKBggqhkjOPQQDAzBfMQsw + CQYDVQQGEwJHQjEYMBYGA1UEChMPU2VjdGlnbyBMaW1pdGVkMTYwNAYDVQQDEy1T + ZWN0aWdvIFB1YmxpYyBTZXJ2ZXIgQXV0aGVudGljYXRpb24gUm9vdCBFNDYwHhcN + MjEwMzIyMDAwMDAwWhcNMzYwMzIxMjM1OTU5WjBgMQswCQYDVQQGEwJHQjEYMBYG + A1UEChMPU2VjdGlnbyBMaW1pdGVkMTcwNQYDVQQDEy5TZWN0aWdvIFB1YmxpYyBT...
...Full output truncated (35 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure:
def test_get_cert_chain_success(): """Validate the issuer for microsoft.com with ms_pem"""
host = "github.com" port = 443
github = get_certificate_chain(host, port)
> assert github[1] == certs.github_issuer_pem E AssertionError: assert '-----BEGIN C...FICATE-----\n' == '-----BEGIN C...FICATE-----\n' E E -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- E + MIIDXzCCAuagAwIBAgIQNuBZ7YiN1Xrt1XC2cn+b2jAKBggqhkjOPQQDAzBfMQsw E + CQYDVQQGEwJHQjEYMBYGA1UEChMPU2VjdGlnbyBMaW1pdGVkMTYwNAYDVQQDEy1T E + ZWN0aWdvIFB1YmxpYyBTZXJ2ZXIgQXV0aGVudGljYXRpb24gUm9vdCBFNDYwHhcN E + MjEwMzIyMDAwMDAwWhcNMzYwMzIxMjM1OTU5WjBgMQswCQYDVQQGEwJHQjEYMBYG E + A1UEChMPU2VjdGlnbyBMaW1pdGVkMTcwNQYDVQQDEy5TZWN0aWdvIFB1YmxpYyBT... E E ...Full output truncated (35 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show
tests/test_ocspchecker.py:54: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_extract_ocsp_url_success

failure.message: ValueError: RSA key format is not supported

testcase.failure:
def test_extract_ocsp_url_success(): """test a successful extract_ocsp_url function invocation"""
host = "github.com" cert_chain = get_certificate_chain(host) > ocsp_url = extract_ocsp_url(cert_chain) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_ocspchecker.py:90: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ocspchecker/ocspchecker.py:211: in extract_ocsp_url certificate = RSA.import_key(str.encode(cert_chain[0])) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Crypto/PublicKey/RSA.py:839: in import_key return _import_keyDER(der, passphrase) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
extern_key = b'0\x82\x03\xec0\x82\x03\x93\xa0\x03\x02\x01\x02\x02\x10\x02vV\x89\xfe\xe5/\x85\xc4\xc8\xa4vP\xe8K\xbe0\n\x06\x08*\x86...\x13\xbdT\xd7b\x1e\x9a\xc6\xc8\x02 Y\xfd\xff0\xaf^S<\x8f>G^{\x82\x1e\xb6l\xeeW\xaf\xa5l\xef\x16\x18L\x1fd+\xe8\x00\xb0' passphrase = None
def _import_keyDER(extern_key, passphrase): """Import an RSA key (public or private half), encoded in DER form."""
decodings = (_import_pkcs1_private, _import_pkcs1_public, _import_subjectPublicKeyInfo, _import_x509_cert, _import_pkcs8)
for decoding in decodings: try: return decoding(extern_key, passphrase) except ValueError: pass
> raise ValueError("RSA key format is not supported") E ValueError: RSA key format is not supported
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Crypto/PublicKey/RSA.py:754: ValueError

testcase.name: test_build_ocsp_request_success

failure.message: Exception: build_ocsp_request: Unable to load x509 certificate.

testcase.failure:
def test_build_ocsp_request_success(): """test a successful build_ocsp_request function invocation"""
host = "github.com" cert_chain = get_certificate_chain(host) > ocsp_request_data = build_ocsp_request(cert_chain) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_ocspchecker.py:100: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
cert_chain = ['-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\nMIID7DCCA5OgAwIBAgIQAnZWif7lL4XEyKR2UOhLvjAKBggqhkjOPQQDAjBgMQsw\nCQYDVQQGEwJHQjEYMBYGA...RHlAFWovgzJQxC36oCMB3q\n4S6ILuH5px0CMk7yn2xVdOOurvulGu7t0vzCAxHrRVxgED1cf5kDW21USAGKcw==\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----\n']
def build_ocsp_request(cert_chain: List[str]) -> bytes: """Build an OCSP request out of the leaf and issuer pem certificates see: https://cryptography.io/en/latest/x509/ocsp/#cryptography.x509.ocsp.OCSPRequestBuilder for more information"""
func_name: str = "build_ocsp_request"
try: leaf_cert = RSA.import_key(str.encode(cert_chain[0])) issuer_cert = RSA.import_key(str.encode(cert_chain[1]))
except ValueError: > raise Exception(f"{func_name}: Unable to load x509 certificate.") from None E Exception: build_ocsp_request: Unable to load x509 certificate.
ocspchecker/ocspchecker.py:241: Exception

testcase.name: test_extract_ocsp_result_unauthorized

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'OCSP respons... implemented.' == 'extract_ocsp... UNAUTHORIZED'
- extract_ocsp_result: OCSP Request Error: UNAUTHORIZED + OCSP response parsing logic needs to be implemented.

testcase.failure:
def test_extract_ocsp_result_unauthorized(): """test an unsuccessful extract_ocsp_result function invocation"""
func_name: str = "extract_ocsp_result"
ocsp_response = get_ocsp_response("http://ocsp.digicert.com", certs.unauthorized_ocsp_data)
with pytest.raises(Exception) as excinfo: extract_ocsp_result(ocsp_response)
> assert str(excinfo.value) == f"{func_name}: OCSP Request Error: UNAUTHORIZED" E AssertionError: assert 'OCSP respons... implemented.' == 'extract_ocsp... UNAUTHORIZED' E E - extract_ocsp_result: OCSP Request Error: UNAUTHORIZED E + OCSP response parsing logic needs to be implemented.
tests/test_ocspchecker.py:175: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_extract_ocsp_result_success

failure.message: ValueError: RSA key format is not supported

testcase.failure:
def test_extract_ocsp_result_success(): """test an unsuccessful extract_ocsp_result function invocation"""
cert_chain = get_certificate_chain("github.com", 443) > ocsp_url = extract_ocsp_url(cert_chain) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_ocspchecker.py:182: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ocspchecker/ocspchecker.py:211: in extract_ocsp_url certificate = RSA.import_key(str.encode(cert_chain[0])) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Crypto/PublicKey/RSA.py:839: in import_key return _import_keyDER(der, passphrase) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
extern_key = b'0\x82\x03\xec0\x82\x03\x93\xa0\x03\x02\x01\x02\x02\x10\x02vV\x89\xfe\xe5/\x85\xc4\xc8\xa4vP\xe8K\xbe0\n\x06\x08*\x86...\x13\xbdT\xd7b\x1e\x9a\xc6\xc8\x02 Y\xfd\xff0\xaf^S<\x8f>G^{\x82\x1e\xb6l\xeeW\xaf\xa5l\xef\x16\x18L\x1fd+\xe8\x00\xb0' passphrase = None
def _import_keyDER(extern_key, passphrase): """Import an RSA key (public or private half), encoded in DER form."""
decodings = (_import_pkcs1_private, _import_pkcs1_public, _import_subjectPublicKeyInfo, _import_x509_cert, _import_pkcs8)
for decoding in decodings: try: return decoding(extern_key, passphrase) except ValueError: pass
> raise ValueError("RSA key format is not supported") E ValueError: RSA key format is not supported
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Crypto/PublicKey/RSA.py:754: ValueError

testcase.name: test_end_to_end_success_test

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ['Host: githu...ot supported'] == ['Host: githu...Status: GOOD']
At index 1 diff: 'Error: RSA key format is not supported' != 'OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com' Right contains one more item: 'OCSP Status: GOOD' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_end_to_end_success_test(): """test the full function end to end"""
ocsp_result = get_ocsp_status("github.com", 443)
> assert ocsp_result == [ "Host: github.com:443", "OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com", "OCSP Status: GOOD", ] E AssertionError: assert ['Host: githu...ot supported'] == ['Host: githu...Status: GOOD'] E E At index 1 diff: 'Error: RSA key format is not supported' != 'OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com' E Right contains one more item: 'OCSP Status: GOOD' E Use -v to get more diff
tests/test_ocspchecker.py:196: AssertionError

testcase.failure:
def test_no_port_supplied(): """Validate that when no port is supplied, the default of 443 is used"""
host = "github.com" ocsp_request = get_ocsp_status(host)
> assert ocsp_request == [ "Host: github.com:443", "OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com", "OCSP Status: GOOD", ] E AssertionError: assert ['Host: githu...ot supported'] == ['Host: githu...Status: GOOD'] E E At index 1 diff: 'Error: RSA key format is not supported' != 'OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com' E Right contains one more item: 'OCSP Status: GOOD' E Use -v to get more diff

failure.message:

At index 1 diff: 'Error: RSA key format is not supported' != 'OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com' Right contains one more item: 'OCSP Status: GOOD' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_strip_http_from_host(): """Validate stripping http from host"""
host = "http://github.com" ocsp_request = get_ocsp_status(host, 443)
> assert ocsp_request == [ "Host: http://github.com:443", "OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com", "OCSP Status: GOOD", ] E AssertionError: assert ['Host: http:...ot supported'] == ['Host: http:...Status: GOOD'] E E At index 1 diff: 'Error: RSA key format is not supported' != 'OCSP URL: http://ocsp.sectigo.com' E Right contains one more item: 'OCSP Status: GOOD' E Use -v to get more diff
